Name: FGPUSpriteResourceData
Description: The source data for runtime resources.

Variables.Name: QuantizedColorSamples
Variables.Description: Quantized color samples.

Variables.Name: QuantizedMiscSamples
Variables.Description: Quantized samples for misc curve attributes to be evaluated at runtime.

Variables.Name: QuantizedSimulationAttrSamples
Variables.Description: Quantized samples for simulation attributes.

Variables.Name: ColorScale
Variables.Description: Scale and bias to be applied to the color of sprites.

Variables.Name: MiscScale
Variables.Description: Scale and bias to be applied to the misc curve.

Variables.Name: SimulationAttrCurveScale
Variables.Description: Scale and bias to be applied to the simulation attribute curves.

Variables.Name: SubImageSize
Variables.Description: Size of subimages. X:SubImageCountH Y:SubImageCountV Z:1SubImageCountH W:1SubImageCountV

Variables.Name: SizeBySpeed
Variables.Description: SizeBySpeed parameters. XY=SpeedScale ZW=MaxSpeedScale.

Variables.Name: ConstantAcceleration
Variables.Description: Constant acceleration to apply to particles.

Variables.Name: OrbitOffsetBase
Variables.Description: Offset at which to orbit.

Variables.Name: OrbitFrequencyBase
Variables.Description: Frequency at which the particle orbits around each axis.

Variables.Name: OrbitPhaseBase
Variables.Description: Phase offset of orbit around each axis.

Variables.Name: GlobalVectorFieldScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to global vector fields.

Variables.Name: GlobalVectorFieldTightness
Variables.Description: Tightness override value for the global vector fields.

Variables.Name: PerParticleVectorFieldScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to per-particle vector field scale.

Variables.Name: PerParticleVectorFieldBias
Variables.Description: Bias to apply to per-particle vector field scale.

Variables.Name: DragCoefficientScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to per-particle drag coefficient.

Variables.Name: DragCoefficientBias
Variables.Description: Bias to apply to per-particle drag coefficient.

Variables.Name: ResilienceScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to per-particle damping factor.

Variables.Name: ResilienceBias
Variables.Description: Bias to apply to per-particle damping factor.

Variables.Name: CollisionRadiusScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to per-particle size for collision.

Variables.Name: CollisionRadiusBias
Variables.Description: Bias to apply to per-particle size for collision.

Variables.Name: CollisionTimeBias
Variables.Description: Bias applied to relative time upon collision.

Variables.Name: CollisionRandomSpread
Variables.Description: Control on reflection's random distribution spread.

Variables.Name: CollisionRandomDistribution
Variables.Description: Control on reflection's random distribution when colliding. (1=uniform distribution)

Variables.Name: OneMinusFriction
Variables.Description: One minus the coefficient of friction applied to particles upon collision.

Variables.Name: RotationRateScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to per-particle rotation rate.

Variables.Name: CameraMotionBlurAmount
Variables.Description: How much to stretch sprites based on camera motion blur.

Variables.Name: ScreenAlignment
Variables.Description: Screen alignment for particles.

Variables.Name: LockAxisFlag
Variables.Description: The method for locking the particles to a particular axis.

Variables.Name: PivotOffset
Variables.Description: Pivot offset in UV space for placing the verts of each particle.

Variables.Name: bRemoveHMDRoll
Variables.Description: If true, removes the HMD view roll (e.g. in VR)

Variables.Name: MinFacingCameraBlendDistance
Variables.Description: The distance at which PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend	is fully PSA_Square

Variables.Name: MaxFacingCameraBlendDistance
Variables.Description: The distance at which PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend	is fully PSA_FacingCameraPosition
